skills.name: Vengeful Fury
skills.description: When this hero's army performs a basic attack, there is a 20% chance to inflict Burning on the target, dealing continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 200) for 2 rounds (applies starting next round). If this effect triggers and the target is already Poisoned, this hero's army gains 100 Rage next round.

skills.name: Serrated Flourish
skills.description: Requires 1,000 Rage. Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1,400) to the target, with a 50% chance to immediately deal another instance of damage (Damage Factor 1,400). The initial strike has a 50% chance to inflict Poison, dealing continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 600) for 3 rounds (starting next round).

talents.name: Soul Awakening
talents.description: Counterattack Damage taken by deployed Troops is reduced by 45%.

talents.name: Flexible Strike
talents.description: If the target is Burning, basic attacks have a 25% chance to deal damage 1 time (Damage Factor 500). If the target is not Burning, basic attacks instead have a 25% chance to heal your own army 1 time (Heal Factor 500).

talents.name: Opportune Strike
talents.description: Every 6 rounds, inflict Poison on the target, dealing continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 650) for 2 rounds (starting next round).

skills.name: Entwined Vines
skills.description: Inflict Poison on the target, dealing continuous damage (Damage Factor 560) every second for 3s. If Nature Mark of deployed Troop reaches 5 stacks, deal additional direct damage (Damage Factor 720).

skills.name: Nature Blessing
skills.description: Every 9s, grant deployed Troop 1 stacks of Nature Mark and 1 time healing (Heal Factor 700). When Nature Mark reaches 5 stacks, deal direct damage (Damage Factor 700) once to the target. When Nature Mark reaches 15 stacks, deployed Troops evasion increases by 100% for 2s, and the Mark is removed.

skills.name: Froral Burial
skills.description: Inflict Poison on the target, dealing continuous damage (Damage Factor 700) every second for 3s. If Nature Mark of deployed Troop reaches 5 stacks, deal additional direct damage (Damage Factor 900) once. If Nature Mark of deployed Troop reaches 10 stacks, trigger Life Drain, converting 50% of the damage dealt to heal deployed Troop.

talents.name: Forest Force
talents.description: The active skill damage of deployed Troop is increased by 20%. And Poison damage is increased by 20%.

talents.name: Natures Killer
talents.description: Every 6s, grant 1 stacks of Nature Mark to deployed Troop. When Nature Mark reaches 5 stacks, inflict Poison on the target, dealing continuous damage (Damage Factor 250) per second for 3s. When Nature Mark reaches 10 stacks, inflict Burning on the target, dealing continuous damage (Damage Factor 400) per second for 3s.

talents.name: Life Cycle
talents.description: When deployed Troop casts an active skill, deployed Troop gains 2 stacks of Nature Mark. If the target is inflicted with Burning, deal direct damage (Damage Factor 900) once to target. If the target is inflicted with Poison, deployed Troop receives healing (Heal Factor 900) once.

skills.name: Rapid Assault
skills.description: Deal direct damage (Damage Factor 1,120) once to the target. There is a 32% chance to trigger Burst once, inflict Burning on tarnet and deal continuous damage (Damage Factor 480) every second for 3s.

skills.name: Hugginns Slingshot
skills.description: Deployed Troops basic attacks have a 20% chance to deal direct damage (Damage Factor 400) once to the target. If the target is inflicted with Burning, this damage is increased (Damage Factor 800).

skills.name: Chain Meteor
skills.description: Deal direct damage (Damage Factor 1,400) once to the target. There is a 40% chance to trigger Burst once, inflict Burning on target and deal continuous damage (Damage Factor 600) every second for 3s. There is a 40% chance to launch an additional Poison Marble, inflict Poison on the target and deal continuous damage (Damage Factor 600) every second for 3s.

talents.name: Fiery Poison Bullet
talents.description: Increase Burning damage by 15%, and increase Poison damage by 15%

talents.name: Fiery Poison Bomb
talents.description: Inflict target with Poison every 9s, dealing continuous damage (Damage Factor 575) per second for 2s, and granting 200 Rage to deployed Troop.

talents.name: Agile Missile
talents.description: Inflict target with Burning every 6s, dealing continuous damage (Damage Factor 450) every second for 2s. If the target is inflicted with Poison, there is a 30% chance to increase deployed Troops evasion by 100% for 1s.

skills.name: Deathly Scythe
skills.description: Inflicts direct damage in a fan shape to up to 3 target Troops once (Damage Factor 1,350), and decreases target Troops Health by 8% for 2s.

skills.name: Plague
skills.description: Every 9 seconds, inflict Poison on the target, dealing continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 500) for 3 seconds. If the target is already Poisoned, damage dealt to the target will be increased by 20% for 3 seconds.

skills.name: Undead Harvest
skills.description: Inflicts direct damage in a fan shape to up to 3 target Troops once (Damage Factor 1,800), and decreases target Troops Health by 10% for 2s.

talents.name: Dreadful Curse
talents.description: Increases Poison Damage by 25%

talents.name: High Fighting Spirit
talents.description: Deals direct damage 1 time (Damage Factor 1300) to the target every 9 seconds and increases Active Skill Damage of your deployed Troops by 20% for 5 seconds.

talents.name: Low Whispers
talents.description: Every 6 seconds, your deployed Troops gain a damage reduction buff, reducing damage taken by 30% for 2 seconds. If the target is Burning, your deployed Troops also gain 180 Rage.

skills.name: High Focus
skills.description: Inflict direct damage to target once (Damage Factor 900), and recover 50 Rage every second for all deployed Troops for 2s. If target is Burning. deployed Troops will gain 100 Rage after 1 round.

skills.name: Enchanted Arrow
skills.description: When the active skill is cast, it has a 35% chance to burn target Troops, inflicting 600 damage per second (Damage Factor 600) for 2s

skills.name: Concentration
skills.description: Inflict direct damage to target once (Damage Factor 1,250), and recover 100 Rage every second for all deployed Troops for 2s. If target is Burning, deployed Troops will gain 200 Rage after 1 round.

talents.name: Scorching Arrow
talents.description: Increases Burn Damage by 15%.

talents.name: Multi-Shot Arrow
talents.description: When your deployed Troops receive active Skill Damage, ther is a 50% chance of dealing 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 750) to the target

talents.name: Poised Shot
talents.description: When deployed Troops use an Active skill, deal direct damage 1 time (Damage Factor 575) to the target, with a 15% chance to reduce targets Rage by 150

skills.name: Road of Conquest
skills.description: Increases the Attack, Defense, and Health of up to 3 ally Troops in a circular range by 12% for 4s. When acting as a Main Commander, 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 900) will be dealt to up to 3 target units in a circular range. The amount of direct damage dealt to each unit will be reduced by 10% for each target previously hit.

skills.name: Unyielding Will
skills.description: When taking Basic Attack Damage, increases the Active Skill Damage of the Secondary Commander by 20% for 3s, with a 15% chance of recovering a certain number of Troops (Recovery Factor 800).

skills.name: Viking Sage
skills.description: Increases the Attack, Defense, and Health of up to 3 ally Troops in a circular range by 15% for 4s. When acting as a Main Commander, 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1,400) will be dealt to up to 3 targets in a circular range, reducing each targets Attack by 20% for 4s. The amount of direct damage dealt to each unit will be reduced by 10% for each target previously hit.

talents.name: Dragons Blood
talents.description: Decreases witing time of Rallied Troops by 60s, and increases Rallied Troops Defense by 5%

talents.name: Deadly Raid
talents.description: Increases deployed Troops Defense by 9%

talents.name: Born King
talents.description: Increases Rallied Troops March Speed by 10%, and increases Rallied Troops Capacity by 15%

skills.name: Wordless
skills.description: Inflicts direct damage in a circular area to up to 3 target Troops 1 time(s) (Damage Factor 600), and decreases targets Rage by 40, with a 50% chance to Silence target (unable to cast active skills) for 1s.

skills.name: Threatening Blade
skills.description: If deployed Troops are greater than target Troops, basic attacks have a 30% chance to inflict direct damage to target once (Damage Factor 253). If deployed Troops are less than target Troops, basic attacks have a 30% chance of increasing deployed Troops defense by 10% for 5s.

skills.name: Intimidation
skills.description: Inflicts direct damage in a circular area to up to 3 target Troops 2 time(s) (Damage Factor 300/Damage Factor 600), and decreases targets Rage by 50, with a 50% chance to Silence target (unable to cast active skills) for 2s.

talents.name: Power of Silence
talents.description: When target Troops are Silenced, there is a 50% chance to reduce target Troops Rage by 125

talents.name: Combat Focus
talents.description: Deals direct damage 1 time (Damage Factor 1000) to the target every 9 seconds.

talents.name: Time Crunch
talents.description: Increases Rallied Troops March Speed by 8%, and increases Rallied Troops Capacity by 10%

skills.name: Resonating Bowstring
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 800) in a fan shape to the 3 targets and reduces their Basic Attack Damage dealt by 25% for 3 seconds.

skills.name: Heartstrike Arrow
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 650) to the target every 9 seconds and restores 50 Rage to deployed Troops.

skills.name: Pierce Through
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1,200) in a fan shape to the 3 targets and reduces their Basic Attack Damage dealt by 30% for 3 seconds.

talents.name: Valuable Experience
talents.description: Increases EXP gained by deployed Troops by 32% when they defeat Niflungs and other neutral units.

talents.name: Vicory Within Reach
talents.description: Increases deployed Troops Damage against Niflungs and other neutral units by 30%.

talents.name: Trap Maker
talents.description: Beast Pen Trap Point Basic Recovery Value increased by 25 per minute (This Talent can be boosted by Beast Taming Workers).

skills.name: Herald
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 450) to up to 3 targets in a circular range, and heals Lightly Wounded units in the Troop once (Heal Factor 225).

skills.name: Armor of Twilight
skills.description: When the deployed Troops take damage from basic attacks, there is a 25% chance to increase Defense by 30% for 2s.

skills.name: Death Rites
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 600) to up to 4 targets in a circular range, and heals Lightly Wounded units in the Troop once (Heal Factor 300).

talents.name: Valuable Experience
talents.description: Increases EXP gained by deployed Troops by 26% when they defeat Niflungs and other neutral units.

talents.name: Standby
talents.description: Increases deployed Troops damage against Niflungs and other neutral units by 15%

talents.name: Pioneer Will
talents.description: Increases deployed Troops Damage against Niflungs and other neutral units by 20%

skills.name: Piercing Thrust
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1440) to the target and inflicts them with Lacerate dealing continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 400) for 2s.

skills.name: Bloody Mad
skills.description: When deployed Troop is healed, there is a 35% chance to inflict Lacerate on the tagret Troop, dealing continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 200) for 2s, and a 35% chance to grant own Troop a shield (Shield Factor 400) for 2s. Triggers up to 1 time every 1s

skills.name: One Stroke One Kill
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1800) to the target and inflicts them with Lacerate dealing continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 500) for 2s. If your own Troop is shielded, inflict Broken Blade on the target Troop for 3s.

talents.name: High Tide Hunt
talents.description: Deployed Troops damage dealt from Lacerate increases by 15%. When deployed Troop counterattacks, there is a 20% chance to reduce your own Troops damage received by 30% for 1s. There is a 20% chance to heal your own Troop (Heal Factor 250). Triggers up to 1 time every 3s.

talents.name: Fierce Fighting Spirit
talents.description: When deployed Troop is healed, there is a 60% chance to deal 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 300) to target Troop. When dealing damage, if the target Troop is inflicted with Lacerate, also inflicts Broken Blade on the target Troop for 1s. Triggers up to 1 time every 1s.

talents.name: Deadly Strike
talents.description: When deployed Troop receives Active Skill Damage, deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 650) to the target Troop, randomly dispels one buff from the target Troop, and grants your own Troop a shield (Shield Factor 650) for 2s. Triggers up to 1 time every is.

skills.name: Lethal Smash
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage to the target Troop (Damage Factor 1600), and grants a shield to your own Troop (Shield Factor 400) for 2s.

skills.name: Boiling Fighting Spirit
skills.description: When deployed Troop launches a counterattack, there is a 20% chance of dealing 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 400) to the target Troop. When dealing damage, if your own Troop is shielded, the target Troop will be inflicted with Lacerate, dealing continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 300) for 3s. Triggers up to 1 time every 3s.

skills.name: Shatter
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage to the target Troop (Damage Factor 2,000), and grants a shield to your own Troop (Shield Factor 500) for 2s. If the target Troop is inflicted with Lacerate, heals your own Troop (Heal Factor 400) for 2s.

talents.name: Hammer And Shield
talents.description: Deployed Troop's shield increases by 15% and damage dealt from Lacerate increases by 15%. When deployed Troop launches a counterattack, there is a 20% chance of dealing 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 200) to the target Troop. Triggers up to 1 time every 3s.

talents.name: Savage Physique
talents.description: When deployed Troop receives healing, there is a 35% chance to deal 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 500) to the target Troop, and randomly Purify 2 debuff from your own Troop. If your own Troop is shielded, immediately restores 150 of their Rage, and increases their Counterattack Damage by 50% for 1 s. Triggers up to 1 time every 2s.

talents.name: Berserk Counterattack
talents.description: When deployed Troop receives a basic attack, there is a 20% chance to grant your own Troop a shield (Shield Factor 500) for 2s, a 15% chance to inflict Broken Blade on the target Troop for 2s, and a 20% chance to inflict Lacerate on the target Troop, dealing continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 300) for 2s. Triggers up to 1 time every 3s.

skills.name: Eloquence
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage to the target Troop (Damage Factor 320) and has a 50% chance to inflict them with Burn. Burning enemies will take continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 60) for 2s.

skills.name: Heart of Tolerance
skills.description: Every 9s, deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 900) to the target Troop, and has a 35% chance to reduce the target Troops Rage by 50.

skills.name: Holy Enlightenment
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1,400) to the target Troop, and has a 50% chance to inflict them with Burn. Burning enemies will take continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 200) for 3s. There is a 50% chance to increase the target Troops damage received by 25% for 3s.

talents.name: Erudite
talents.description: Increases deployed Troops Burning damage dealt by 15% and Poison damage dealt by 10%

talents.name: Strategize
talents.description: Every 9s, increases deployed Troops Command Skill damage dealt by 35% for 3s. If the target Troop is inflicted with Burning, there is a 50% chance for deployed Troop to receive healing (Heal Factor 600).

talents.name: Adaptable to Changes
talents.description: Every 6s, deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 650) to the target Troop, and has a 50% chance to inflict the target Troop with Poison. Poisoned enemies take continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 250) for 2s.

skills.name: Authoritative Suppression
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1325) to the target Troop, and heals own Troop (Heal Factor 310).

skills.name: Zeal
skills.description: When deployed Troop receives healing, there is a 20% chance to deal 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 750) to the target Troop, and a 20% chance to randomly Purify 1 debuffs from your own Troop. Triggers up to 1 time every 3s.

skills.name: Vanquishing Blade
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1700) to the target Troop, and heals own Troop (Heal Factor 400), and reduces damage taken by 10% for 2s

talents.name: Hold Fast
talents.description: When deployed Troop counterattacks, there is a 15% chance to grant them a shield (Shield Factor 600) for 2s. Triggers up to 1 time every 4s.

talents.name: Tit for Tat
talents.description: When deployed Troop receives Active Skill Damage, deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 500) to the target Troop. If your own Troop does not have a shield, they receive 30% less damage for 1s. Triggers up to 1 time every 1s.

talents.name: Determined Defense
talents.description: When deployed Troop receives a basic attack, there is a 20% chance to deal 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 300) to the target Troop, and heal your own Troop (Heal Factor 300). If your own Troop has a shield, the target Troop receives Broken Blade for 1s. Triggers up to 1 time every 3 seconds.

skills.name: Death Omen Crossbow
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 900) to the target and inflicts them with Poison. Poisoned enemies will take continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 220) for 3 seconds. Also increases own Troop's evasion by 15% for 1 seconds.

skills.name: Foresight
skills.description: Every 9 seconds, inflict a Burning effect on the target Troop, causing continuous damage per second (Damage Factor 350) for 3 seconds. If deployed Troop is flanked in Outer City Battles, it deals 1 additional instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 500) to the target Troop, and heals itself 1 time (Heal Factor 500).

skills.name: Face Perils Together
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1,200) to the target and inflicts them with Poison. Poisoned enemies will take continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 300) for 3 seconds. Also increases own Troop's evasion by 20% for 1 seconds, and increases the damage taken by the target by 25% for 1 seconds.

talents.name: Eagle Flame Pursuit
talents.description: The active skill damage of deployed Troop is increased by 20%, and Burning damage dealt is increased by 20%.

talents.name: Shadowed Gaze Ambush
talents.description: Every 9 seconds, deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 750) to the target, randomly dispels 1 buff from the target, and restores 200 Rage to your own Troop. If your Troop is under the evasion effect, additionally inflicts Poison on the target Troop. Poisoned enemies will take continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 600) for 2 seconds.

talents.name: Heralding Eagles Cry
talents.description: Every 6 seconds, if the target is Poisoned, there is a 100% chance to deal 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 500) and increase the target's damage received by 20% for 2 seconds. If the target is Burning, your Troop has a 100% chance to receive healing (Heal Factor 500) 1 time, and increase evasion by 40% for 1 seconds.

skills.name: Poison Blades Kiss
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 480) to the target and inflicts them with Poison. Poisoned enemies will take continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 360) for 3 seconds. If the target is inflicted with Poison, deals 1 instance of direct damage to the target (Damage Factor 320).

skills.name: Burning Blade Scorching Heart
skills.description: Every 9 seconds, inflict a Burning effect on the target Troop, causing continuous damage per second (Damage Factor 325) for 3 seconds. If your Troop has fewer units than the target Troop, heal this Hero's Troop 1 time (Heal Factor 650). If your Troop has more units than the target Troop, deal 1 instance of direct damage to the target (Damage Factor 650).

skills.name: Dance of Death
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 600) to the target and inflicts them with Poison. Poisoned enemies will take continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 450) for 3 seconds. If the target is inflicted with Poison, deals 1 instance of direct damage to the target (Damage Factor 400). If the target is inflicted with Burning, deployed Troop's evasion increases by 40% for 1 seconds.

talents.name: Bloody Slash Venomous Bite
talents.description: The Active Skill damage of deployed Troop is increased by 20%, and Poison damage is increased by 20%.

talents.name: Armor-corroding Blood
talents.description: When deployed Troop receives healing, there is a 50% chance to inflict Poison on the target, dealing continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 350) for 2 seconds, and reduce deployed Troop's damage received by 30% for 1 seconds. If target is inflicted with Burning, dispels 1 random buff on the target.

talents.name: Returning Blood Flame Edge
talents.description: Inflict target with Burning every 6s, dealing continuous damage (Damage Factor 400) every second for 2 seconds. There is a 50% chance to increase deployed Troop's evasion by 40% for 1 seconds, a 50% chance to restore 300 Rage to this Hero's Troop, and a 50% chance to Purify 1 random debuff on this Hero's Troop.

skills.name: Falling Impact
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1,300) to up to 4 target Troops within a circular area. If deployed Troop has more units than the target, the target will be inflicted with Bleed. Bleeding enemies will take continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 320) for 2s. If deployed Troop has fewer units than the target, grants Retribution to the deployed Troop, increasing Retribution Rate by 40% for 2s.

skills.name: Broken Blade Charge
skills.description: When deployed Troop performs a basic attack, if deployed Troop is inflicted with Retribution, there is a 25% chance that they will get a shield (Shield Factor 400) for 2s, and a 25% chance to inflict Slow on target Troops, reducing their March Speed by 30% for 2s. If target Troops are inflicted with Silence, there is a 50% chance to deal 1 instance of direct damage to the target (Damage Factor 500). If target Troops are inflicted with Bleed, there is a 20% chance that deployed Troop will receive 1 instance of healing (Heal Factor 400).

skills.name: Time of Severance
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1,600) to up to 4 target Troops within a circular area. If deployed Troop has more units than the target, the target will be inflicted with Bleed. Bleeding enemies will take continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 400) for 2s. If deployed Troop has fewer units than the target, grants Retribution to the deployed Troop, increasing Retribution Rate by 50% for 2s. If target Troops are inflicted with Slow, deals 1 additional instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 600) to target Troops.

talents.name: Shattered Edge
talents.description: Increases deployed Troops Basic Attack Damage by 20%, and Bleed Damage dealt by 20%.

talents.name: Oathbreakers Blade
talents.description: When deployed Troop activates an Active Skill, target Troop is inflicted with Silence for 1s. If deployed Troop has more units than the target, deals 1 instance of direct damage to target (Damage Factor 800). If deployed Troop has fewer units than the target, reduces the damage taken by deployed Troop by 20% for 1s, and deployed Troop receives 1 instance of healing (Heal Factor 600).

talents.name: Exiled Bloodblade
talents.description: When deployed Troop performs a basic attack, there is a 20% chance to inflict the target Troop with Bleed (Damage Factor 400) for 1s, and deployed Troop gains Retribution, increasing Retribution Rate by 50% for 1 s. When this effect is triggered, if target Troop is already inflicted with Bleed, they will be inflicted with Silence for 1s. If the deployed Troop already has Retribution, it will gain a shield (Shield Factor 400) for 1s.

skills.name: Blade of Conquest
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage to the target Troop (Damage Factor 1,440), grants your Troop the Retribution effect, increasing Retribution Rate by 40% for 2 seconds. If the target Troop is inflicted with Bleed, your Troop will be healed 1 time (Heal Factor 320).

skills.name: Winters Coronation
skills.description: When deployed Troop activates an Active Skill, it causes the target Troop to suffer from Bleed, taking continuous damage per second (Damage Factor 400) for 2 seconds. If the deployed Troop's units are higher than the target Troop's units, the target Troop is slowed, reducing March Speed by 30% for 2 seconds. If the deployed Troop's units are lower than the target Troop's units, the deployed Troop gains a shield (Shield Factor 400) for 2 seconds and purifies 1 debuffs from itself.

skills.name: Triumphant Presence
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage to the target Troop (Damage Factor 1,800), grants your Troop the Retribution effect, increasing Retribution Rate by 50% for 2 seconds. If the target Troop is inflicted with Bleed, your Troop will be healed 1 time (Heal Factor 400). If the target Troop is inflicted with Slow, deals 1 additional instance of direct damage to the target Troop (Damage Factor 400).

talents.name: Northern Blood Feast
talents.description: Increases deployed Troop's Basic Attack Damage by 30%. When performing a basic attack, if target is inflicted with Slow, there is a 50% chance to inflict Bleed on the target Troops (Damage Factor 150) for 1s.

talents.name: Cold Iron Oath
talents.description: When deployed Troop performs a basic attack, there is a 20% chance to deal 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 400). When dealing damage, if the target Troop is inflicted with Slow, 1 additional distance of direct damage (Damage Factor 400) will be dealt to target Troops. If target Troop is inflicted with Bleed, there is a 50% chance that your Troop will be healed 1 time (Heal Factor 400).

talents.name: Royal Authority
talents.description: When deployed Troop performs a basic attack, there is a 15% chance to grant them Retribution, increasing Retribution Rate by 50% for 2s. If deployed Troop is inflicted with Retribution, there is a 50% chance to inflict Silence on target Troops for 1 s. If target Troops are inflicted with Bleed, there is a 50% chance to increase the damage received by target Troop by 20% for 1s.

skills.name: Riding Waves
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1,600) to the target and inflicts them with Lacerate. Lacerated enemies will take continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 240) for 3 seconds. If the target is inflicted with Broken Blade, deployed Troop receives healing 1 time (Heal Factor 640).

skills.name: Roam the World
skills.description: When deployed Troop receives a basic attack, there is a 20% chance to grant your own Troop a shield (Shield Factor ??) for 2s, a 20% chance to inflict Lacerate on the target Troop, dealing continuous damage every second (Damage Factor ??) for 2s, and a 20% chance to deal 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor ???) to the target. Triggers up to 1 time every 3s.(Triggers up to 1 time(s) in every 3 second period)

skills.name: Sea-sundering Strike
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 2,000) to the target and inflicts them with Lacerate. Lacerated enemies will take continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 300) for 3 seconds. If the target is inflicted with Broken Blade, deployed Troop receives healing 1 time (Heal Factor 800). If the deployed Troop is in a Shielded state, deals 1 additional instance of direct damage to the target (Damage Factor 600).

talents.name: Colossal Anchor Strike
talents.description: Deployed Troop's damage dealt from Lacerate increases by 20%. When deployed Troop counterattacks, there is a 20% chance to inflict Lacerate on target Troop that deals continuous damage each second (Damage Factor 200) for 2 seconds. This effect can only trigger once every 3 seconds.

talents.name: Raging Waves
talents.description: When deployed Troop counterattacks, there is a 20% chance to inflict Broken Blade on the target Troop for 1 seconds. When this effect is triggered, if the target Troop is inflicted with Lacerate, increase deployed Troops' Counterattack Damage by 40% for 2 seconds. If your own Troop is shielded, immediately restores 200 of their Rage. Triggers up to 1 time every 3s.

talents.name: Wavebreaker Shield
talents.description: When deployed Troop receives Active Skill Damage, grants your own Troop a shield (Shield Factor 600) for 2s and purifies 2 Debuff effects from the Troop. If the target Troop is inflicted with Lacerate, deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 600) to the target. If deployed Troop is flanked receive healing (Heal Factor 800) 1 time. Triggers up to 1 time every 1s.

skills.name: Shoveling Snow
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 1,600) to up to 3 targets within a circular area, and grants a shield to your own Troop (Shield Factor 800) for 2s. If the target Troop is inflicted with Lacerate, inflicts Broken Blade on the target Troop for 2s.

skills.name: Sharp and Alert
skills.description: When deployed Troop counterattacks, there is a 20% chance to inflict Lacerate on the target Troop, dealing continuous damage every second (Damage Factor 250) for 2s, a 20% chance to inflict Broken Blade on the target Troop for 1s, and a 20% chance to grant your own Troop a shield (Shield Factor 400) for 2s. Triggers up to 1 time every 3s.(Triggers up to 1 time(s) in every 3 second period)

skills.name: Invincible Iron Shovel
skills.description: Deals 1 instance of direct damage (Damage Factor 2,000) to up to 4 targets within a circular area, and grants a shield to your own Troop (Shield Factor 1,000) for 2s. If the target Troop is inflicted with Lacerate, inflicts Broken Blade on the target Troop for 2s. If the target is inflicted with Broken Blade, deployed Troop receives healing 1 time (Heal Factor 800).

talents.name: Rolling Potato
talents.description: Increases deployed Troop's shield by 15% and increases their Healing Received by 15%. When deployed Troop receives a basic attack, there is a 30% chance that deployed Troop receives healing 1 time (Heal Factor 250). Triggers up to 1 time every 2s.

talents.name: Snowball Splat
talents.description: When deployed Troop receives Active Skill Damage, inflicts Broken Blade on the target Troop for 1 s. If your own Troop is shielded, increases their Counterattack Damage by 100% for 1 seconds. If the target is inflicted with Lacerate, deals 1 instance of direct damage to the target (Damage Factor 1,000). Triggers up to 1 time every 1s.

talents.name: Paw Assault
talents.description: When deployed Troop receives healing, there is a 40% chance to reduce the damage taken by your Troop by 30% for 1 seconds. When this effect is triggered, if your own Troop is shielded, deals 1 instance of direct damage to the target (Damage Factor 300). If the target is inflicted with Broken Blade, dispels 2 buffs from the target. If the target Troop is inflicted with Lacerate, increases damage taken by the target by 30% for 1 seconds. Triggers up to 1 time every 3s.
